name: Busy Day Beef Stew/cp
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Stew beef, divided into 1 1/2 cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer the cubed potatoes at the bottom of the liner.
2. Place the cut carrots on top of the potatoes.
3. Add the stew beef to the mixture.
4. Sprinkle the soy sauce, crushed bouillon cubes, pepper, and flour evenly over the meat.
5. Spread the chopped onions over the top.
6. Pour the beef broth and tomato sauce over everything.
7. Place the liner in the base of the appliance.
8. Cover and cook on AUTO for 7 hours, or COOK ON LOW for 9-11 hours, or COOK ON HIGH for 5 hours.
